name: Eggcited Thrillipede
description: Eggcited Thrillipede is the Easter counterpart of Thrillipede in Skylanders: SuperChargers.
biography: Thrillipede is all suited up and ready to defend his title as the reigning Dragon Egg Toss Champion. After last year's controversy, when Kaos wrongly accused him of coating several Dragon Eggs with sticky tape, Thrillipede is eager to show everyone that his egg tossing supremacy was no fluke. And to prove his point, he's agreed to enter the competition with one hand tied behind his back!
personality: Eggcited Thrillipede is a confident and highly competitive athlete. He is extremely proud of his status as the Dragon Egg Toss Champion and is willing to go to extreme lengths, such as fighting with one hand tied behind his back, to prove that his egg tossing supremacy was no fluke.

story.content: Thrillipede is all suited up and ready to defend his title as the reigning Dragon Egg Toss Champion. After last year's controversy, when Kaos wrongly accused him of coating several Dragon Eggs with sticky tape, Thrillipede is eager to show everyone that his egg tossing supremacy was no fluke. And to prove his point, he's agreed to enter the competition with one hand tied behind his back!

trivia: While his eyes are normal in his promotional art, Eggcited Thrillipede's eyes in the games proper are completely black.

trailers.name: OFFICIAL Skylanders SuperChargers Action Clips Eggcited Thrillipede

gameplay: In Skylanders: SuperChargers, Eggcited Thrillipede is a Life element SuperCharger who specializes in using explosives and his many limbs. His attacks include throwing Bug Bombs, engaging in Bug Brawls, and immobilizing enemies by keeping them Cocooned. He can also use Better Fly for mobility and summon Gnawing Gnats to distract and damage his enemies.

basic.name: Bug Bomb
basic.content: Throws explosive bug bombs at enemies.

basic.name: Bug Brawl
basic.content: Engages in close-quarters combat with multiple limbs.

basic_upgrades.name: Cocooned
basic_upgrades.content: Traps enemies in a sticky cocoon to immobilize them.

basic_upgrades.name: Better Fly
basic_upgrades.content: Enhances flight capabilities for better mobility.

soulgems.name: Gnawing Gnats
soulgems.content: Summons a swarm of gnats that persistently attack and distract enemies.
